bandSize.label: Band Size
bandSize.description: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each color band of the marquee pattern.

reverse.label: Reverse
reverse.description: When enabled, the marquee pattern moves in the opposite direction around the perimeter.

skipSize.label: Skip Size
skipSize.description: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each color band. Zero means bands are placed back-to-back with no gap.

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: How fast the marquee pattern moves around the perimeter. Zero freezes the animation.

stagger.label: Stagger
stagger.description: Offsets the starting position of each concentric ring so inner rings appear shifted relative to outer rings, creating a spiral-like look.

thickness.label: Thickness
thickness.description: Number of concentric marquee rings drawn inward from the outer edge. Each ring is offset by one pixel toward the center.

registryDefinition.notes: Readable border and perimeter motion effect. Band/skip/thickness/speed should be screened before less common positioning controls.
